name: Alex Johnson
summary: Mid-level Data Engineer with 5 years of experience in designing, building, and maintaining scalable data pipelines. Proficient in cloud platforms and big data technologies, seeking to leverage expertise to drive data-driven insights and solutions.

experience.title: Data Engineer
experience.description: Developed and optimized ETL/ELT pipelines using Python and Spark for large-scale data processing. Implemented data warehousing solutions on AWS Redshift, improving query performance by 30%. Collaborated with data scientists to ensure data quality and accessibility for analytics.

experience.title: Junior Data Engineer
experience.description: Assisted in the design and implementation of data ingestion processes from various sources. Wrote SQL queries for data extraction and transformation. Monitored data pipeline performance and troubleshooted issues.

experience.title: Data Analyst Intern
experience.description: Supported the data analytics team by performing data cleaning and validation. Created reports and dashboards using BI tools. Gained foundational knowledge in data manipulation and analysis.
